name: HydroGrid
description: Client-side farmland-hydration overlay. Hold a water bucket to preview the 9x9 it irrigates, plus ghost markers for the next bucket on a seamless, zero-waste 9-block grid. Field Fill: give it two corners (type them with N, or stamp each with V in-world) and it marks every dig-and-place spot to irrigate the whole field with the minimum water, checking spots off as you fill them. Toggle with H.
